_publications._publicationTitle: Transplanting neurofibromatosis-1 gene knockout neural stem cells improve functional recovery in rats with spinal cord injury by enhancing the mTORC2 pathway.

_contextSnippet: the counts of NF-200-, MAP2- and β3-Tubulin-positive cells in the SCI+LV-NF-1 NSC group were 1.8-, 2.1-, and 2.2-fold greater, respectively
details: NF-1 knockout NSCs showed 1.8-fold greater NF-200-positive cells, 2.1-fold greater MAP2-positive cells, and 2.2-fold greater β3-Tubulin-positive cells compared to vector control
